word: H2740 - חָרֹון - chârôwn - khaw-rone' - Sore displeasure

sections.paragraph:
Original: חרן חרון

Transliteration: chârôn chârôn

Phonetic: khaw-rone'

BDB Definition:

  1. anger, heat, burning (of anger)
    1. always used of God's anger

Origin: from H2734

TWOT entry: 736a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
